ogTitle: Glen Isla vs Glen Niven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Isla and Glen Niven.
heading: Glen Isla vs Glen Niven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Isla, Queensland and Glen Niven, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Isla has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Glen Niven (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Isla or Glen Niven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Isla has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Glen Niven scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Isla scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Niven scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Isla or Glen Niven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Isla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
